title: sphaerocionium lanatum
intro: Sphaerocionium lanatum, also known as the hairy jelly lichen, is a type of lichen that belongs to the family Croadidae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Sphaerocionium lanatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb for treating skin conditions and infections. The herbal preparations of Sphaerocionium lanatum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
